description_long: This is a medium-sized pumpkin with a pale, almost white exterior, accented by subtle brownish streaks and a darker, weathered stem at the top. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with natural grooves running vertically from the stem to the base, giving it a classic ribbed appearance. The coloration is uneven, with some areas showing more pronounced brownish discoloration, especially near the stem and in the crevices. The pumpkin appears solid and uncarved, with no visible openings, cutouts, or decorative elements. Its form is squat and rounded, with a broad base and a gently domed top. The stem is short, thick, and slightly curved, adding to the naturalistic look of the pumpkin.
description: A pale, ribbed pumpkin with brownish streaks and a dark, weathered stem. The surface is matte, slightly rough, and uncarved.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is shown with its stem clearly visible, highlighting the pale surface and brownish streaks radiating from the top.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the front ribbing and the central placement of the stem, with more shadowing at the base.
description_view_2: The pumpkin appears darker overall, with the stem less prominent and the ribbing more pronounced due to the lighting.
description_view_3: The side of the pumpkin is shown, with the stem visible but less central, and the pale coloration more dominant.
